testsuite.name: com.bookService.ledger.service.LedgerRecordingServiceIntegrationTest

testcase.name: 항목 2개(서로 다른 판매자) → 각각 독립된 분개(2쌍, 4행)로 기록되고 완결 통지에 orderId가 담긴다
items가 비어 있어도 크래시 없이 완결 통지는 반환된다
중복 전달(재처리)이어도 분개는 중복 기록되지 않고 완결 통지는 다시 반환된다

testsuite.system-out: 2026-07-15T05:18:04.875+09:00 INFO 12460 --- [ledger-worker] [ Test worker] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.bookService.ledger.service.LedgerRecordingServiceIntegrationTest]: LedgerRecordingServiceIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-07-15T05:18:04.877+09:00 INFO 12460 --- [ledger-worker] [ Test worker] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.bookService.ledger.LedgerWorkerApplication for test class com.bookService.ledger.service.LedgerRecordingServiceIntegrationTest 2026-07-15T05:18:04.900+09:00 INFO 12460 --- [ledger-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.ledger.service.LedgerLineRecorder : 장부 기록 완료: orderId=ledger-svc-test-8d4e9d63-781d-4237-acb7-d8aa32bdae0b, sellerId=101, productId=isbn-1, amount=12000 2026-07-15T05:18:04.919+09:00 INFO 12460 --- [ledger-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.ledger.service.LedgerLineRecorder : 장부 기록 완료: orderId=ledger-svc-test-8d4e9d63-781d-4237-acb7-d8aa32bdae0b, sellerId=102, productId=isbn-2, amount=8000 2026-07-15T05:18:04.960+09:00 INFO 12460 --- [ledger-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.ledger.service.LedgerLineRecorder : 장부 기록 완료: orderId=ledger-svc-test-862f90f5-53f3-4a8d-9d43-657c7e23ce8f, sellerId=201, productId=isbn-dup, amount=7000 2026-07-15T05:18:04.968+09:00 INFO 12460 --- [ledger-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.ledger.service.LedgerLineRecorder : 이미 기록된 장부 줄 ? 중복 전달 skip: orderId=ledger-svc-test-862f90f5-53f3-4a8d-9d43-657c7e23ce8f, sellerId=201, productId=isbn-dup
